series_metadata.series_title: Emergency Board Request for Out-of-State Travel
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used to obtain authorization from the Controlling Board for out-of-state travel for a state employee. Original and 2 copies sent to Controlling Board. Copy retained by Business Administration.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If approved, retain 4 fiscal years, then destroy. If disapproved, destroy immediately, Paper: Wastepaper
